title: Proclamation No. 845, s. 2005
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 845

DECLARING A PARCEL OF RECLAIMED LAND, LOCATED IN BARANGAY COLON, MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CEBU, AS SITE OF THE POWER PLANT FACILITIES OF THE NATIONAL POWER CORPORATION (NPC), DECLARING THE SAME ALIENABLE AND DISPOSABLE, AND TRANSFERRING ITS OWNERSHIP TO NPC, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PROCLAMATION NO. 810 DATED MARCH 15, 2005

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources, and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Republic of the Philippines, do hereby declare a certain parcel of reclaimed land, located in Barangay Colon, Municipality of Naga, Province of Cebu, as site of the power, plant facilities of the National Power Corporation (NPC), declaring the same alienable and disposable and no longer necessary for public service, and transferring its ownership to NPC, amending for the purpose Proclamation No. 810 dated March 15, 2005, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to actual survey, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows:

SK-07-000039

“A PARCEL OF LAND (SK-07-000039) situated in the Barangay of Colon, Municipality of Naga, Province of Cebu, Island of Cebu.

Bounded on the NW. along line 1-2 by Lot 757; on the NW., and SW., along lines 2-3-4 by Lot 12585 all of Naga Cad 747-D; on the NW., along line 4-5 by National Road (20.00 m. wide); on the NE., and NW., along lines 5-6-7 by Lot 758; on the NW., and SW., along lines 7-8-9 by lot 759 all of Naga Cad 747-D; on the NW., along line 9-10 by National Road (20.00 m. wide); on the NE., and NW., along lines 10-11-12 by Lot 760; on the NW., along line 12-13 by Lot 761; along line 13-14 by Lot 762; along line 14-15 by Lot 763; along line 15-16 by Lot 764; along line 16-17 by Lot 765; along line 17-18 by Lot 766; along line 18-19 by Lot 767; along line 19-20 by Lot 768; along line 20-21 by Lot 769; along line 21-22 by Lot 770; on the NE., and NW., along lines 22-23-24 by Lot 771; on the NW., along line 24-25 by Lot 772; along line 25-26 by Lot 773; on the NE., and NW., along lines 26-27-28 by Lot 774; on the NW., along line 28-29 by Lot 12573; along line 29-30 by Lot 776; along lines 30-31-32 by Lot 777; on point 32 by Lot 1083, all of Naga Cad 747-D; on the NE., SE., and SW., along lines 32-33-34-35 with Environmental Protection (20.00 m. wide) by Bohol Strait; on the NW., along lines 35-36-37 by Lot 752; along line 37-38 with SP-07-01-000081 by Lot 753; on the SW., along line 38-39 by Lot 754; on the NW., along line 39-40 by Lot 755; along line 40-1 by Lot 756 all of Naga Cad 747-D.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being N. 14 deg. 18′ E, 957.36 meters from BLLM No. 1, Cad. 747-D, Naga Cadastre;

beginning, containing an area of NINETY SIX THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED NINETY FOUR (96,994) SQUARE METERS , more or less.

The Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources is hereby authorized to issue a Special Patent in the name of the National Power Corporation covering the area herein described as site of the power plant facilities, subject to applicable laws, rules and regulations.

Further, since public service requires the land being leased to qualified private parties, the lease of the subject land to private parties is hereby authorized.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done, in the City of Manila, this 23rd day of May in the year of our Lord, Two Thousand and Five.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
